meaning: n.[植]花粉粒外壁 孢子外壁
examples: Alveolae of the proximal exine are smaller and less regular in form than those at equatorial region.
Except for some differences in exine ornamentation and pollen size, there is no great evolutionary divergence among genera in pollen morphology.
Method: Pollen exine ultrastructure were compared for 18 populations growing under in the same environment by means of scanning electron microscope (SEM).
